sections.paragraph:
Original: יצר

Transliteration: yêtser

Phonetic: yay'-tser

BDB Definition:

  1. form, framing, purpose, framework
    1. form
      1. pottery
      2. graven image
      3. man (as formed from the dust)
    2. purpose, imagination, device (intellectual framework)

Origin: from H3335

TWOT entry: 898a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
